Cursed Weapon Defense - Help

Event Manager Panel (Defense): //cw_test_toggle - Enable/Disable Test Mode. //cw_phase_1 - Force Phase 1 - 18:00 (Normal/Coward). //cw_phase_2 - Force Phase 2 - 22:30 (Special/Attack). //cw_stop - Stop the event, removing cursed swords from players and petrifying NPCs to switch event mode off. //cw_unprison - Select the player and use this command, it will remove the debuff Soul of Prison - Zariche/Akamanah.
Basic Commands: //cw_info_menu - Open the main panel. //cw_info - Show status in the chat window. //cw_add - Apply the weapon to the target. //cw_remove - Remove the weapon from the player/world. //cw_goto - Teleport to the cursed weapon. //cw_reload - Reload weapon configs.
